xxs.$description: Smallest spacing step. Use mainly for tight text-adjacent spacing where the board allows 4px multiples.

xs.$description: Base half-step for compact padding and gaps.

s.$description: Compact spacing step between 8px and the common 16px unit.

m.$description: Primary compact layout unit. One of the most-used values called out by the spacing board.

l.$description: Intermediate layout step for slightly looser padding or component gaps.

xl.$description: Primary roomy layout unit. One of the most-used values called out by the spacing board.

xxl.$description: Large spacing step for major grouping, section rhythm, or broad padding.

xxxl.$description: Largest spacing step from the board for wide separation between major areas.

stack.$description: Default vertical or horizontal gap between related UI elements.

cluster.$description: Looser gap for grouped controls, cards, or content clusters.
